title: drymochloa grandis
intro: Drymochloa grandis, also known as the Himalayan fern, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Dennstaedtiaceae and is native to the Himalayas. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Drymochloa grandis include its ability to treat various health issues such as fever, digestive problems, and skin infections. The herbal preparations of Drymochloa grandis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
